issues.description: Plan directly contradicts ADR-0002 §Required Hardening clause 7 without superseding it
issues.resolution: User confirmed Option A (return []). ADR-0007 written to supersede ADR-0002 clause 7. ADR-0002 status updated.

issues.description: Plan §Architecture claims 'No ADRs needed' while changing a decision explicitly recorded in ADR-0002
issues.resolution: ADR-0007 created; plan §Architecture and §Decisions updated to reference it.

issues.description: Parser regression and genuine zero-result query produce identical output after the change
issues.resolution: Accepted risk. Documented in ADR-0007 §Consequences. Mitigated by live fixture integration tests mandated by ADR-0002.

issues.description: Plan presents false binary (raise wrong type vs return []); typed exception was a viable alternative
issues.resolution: User chose Option A (return []) over typed exception approach. Recorded in ADR-0007.

issues.description: No MCP integration test for empty-results-as-success path through FastMCP serialisation layer
search_normas cited as implicit precedent but may itself be non-conformant with ADR-0002
issues.resolution: ADR-0007 explicitly documents search_normas as already following the [] contract, legitimising the pattern for both tools.

issues.description: search_normas alignment not tracked as follow-up
issues.resolution: ADR-0007 §Scope documents search_normas as already conformant — no follow-up needed.

issues.description: Line number references in plan tasks were approximate
issues.resolution: Accepted — line references are informational; acceptance criteria define correctness.

pr.title: fix(search): complete empty-results contract — docstring, MCP test, ADR-0007

layer_1.note: Task 1 (fix raise) and Task 3 (update test) were already committed in efb1fd0. Task 2 (docstring) applied here.
